notes: bytes.hex is the MarmotNostrRoutingUpdateV1 payload, not the AppDataUpdate proposal wrapper.
The update payload contains only relays<V>.
MarmotNostrRelayV1.url<1..512> is encoded with a two-byte vector length.
relays<V> is encoded with a four-byte vector length.
There is no v1 update that changes nostr_group_id.
